title: Gaia Real Skill Catalog
description: Upstream curation catalog of real-world skill implementations discovered across the ecosystem. Items are the primary identity unit — each item is a real, named skill from a contributor's repo. Abstract Gaia skill IDs (mapsToGaia) serve as the taxonomy backing. Populated by crawlers and maintainers; reviewed before items are promoted to named skills.

version.description: Schema version for this catalog file.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when this catalog was last updated.

sources.description: Origin repositories crawled or manually curated for this catalog.

repo.description: GitHub repo in owner/repo format (e.g. paulirish/superpowers).

url.description: Direct URL to the repo or skill index page.

crawledAt.description: Date this source was last crawled.

items.description: Individual real-world skill implementations. Each item represents a specific skill from a contributor's repo.

id.description: Stable slug for this catalog item (e.g. karpathy-autoresearch). Used as catalogRef in named skills.

name.description: Human-readable name of this real-world skill (e.g. karpathy/autoresearch or superpowers/brainstorming).

contributor.description: GitHub username of the contributor who created or owns this skill.

title.description: Reviewer-assigned RPG epithet (e.g. 'The Scholar's Compass'). Set only after reviewer classification.

description.description: What this real-world skill implementation does.

path.description: Path to the SKILL.md or implementation file within the source repo.

sourceRepo.description: GitHub repo in owner/repo format where this skill lives.

url.description: Direct URL to the skill file or landing page.

mapsToGaia.description: Abstract Gaia skill IDs this real-world skill corresponds to. Many-to-many: one real skill may map to multiple abstract IDs. These are taxonomy backings, not primary identity.

promotedNamedSkillId.description: Set post-promotion. The namedSkill id (contributor/skill-name) that this catalog item was promoted into. Closes the bidirectional link.

addedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when this item was added to the catalog.

tags.description: Lowercase tags for search and categorization.
